name: BIO-TECHNE Corp
summary: Bio-Techne Corporation is a life sciences company that develops and manufactures biological reagents, instruments, and clinical controls. The company provides proteins, antibodies, assays, and analytical instruments used in research and clinical diagnostics. Its products serve academic researchers, biopharmaceutical companies, and clinical laboratories globally across its multiple business segments.
